title: verbascum pseudovarians
intro: Verbascum pseudovarians, also known as Yellow Mullein, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mullein genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and velvety leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Yellow Mullein include soothing irritated throats, reducing inflammation, and providing relief from allergies and sinus congestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
